identity.name: Renergizr Industries
identity.description: A redesign focusing on corporate trust, similar to IEX India and GMR. Moving away from generic startup vibes to established industry authority.

usage.primary: Main headers, Footer, Primary Buttons, Strong Text
usage.secondary: Success states, Renewable energy indicators, Sustainability icons
usage.accent: Call to Actions (CTAs), Key data points, Hover states

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

layout_strategies.alignment: Left-aligned mostly, Center only for brief Hero introductions

Hero.style: Split layout or Full width with dark overlay. High impact typography.
Hero.content: Tagline: 'Empowering Energy Markets'. Metrics ticker at bottom.

NewsTicker.style: Slim bar, dark background (#0F172A), white text, slow scrolling.
NewsTicker.location: Top of page or below Hero

ServiceCard.style: White bg, slight shadow, top colored border (Green/Blue). No full border.
ServiceCard.interaction: Lift on hover, icon color change.

StatsRow.style: High contrast, big numbers (Manrope Bold), labeled neatly.

Timeline.style: Vertical line left, cards on right. Clean typography for years.

hero.description: High voltage transmission lines, industrial feel

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (H1-H4) and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Create a 'NewsTicker' component that sits at the top or bottom of the Hero.
The Design MUST be 'Corporate Industrial'. Sharp corners or small radius (rounded-sm). No full rounded buttons.
Use the dark Navy (#0F172A) for the Footer and Navbar to anchor the design.
For the 'Products & Services', use a grid layout with cards that have a top-border color (Green or Blue) instead of a full border.
Ensure the 'About' section has a visual timeline component for the history.
Contact page must be functional and clean, with the office map and details clearly visible.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT use gradients for main backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Do NOT use standard 'Inter' font. Use the specified fonts.
Ensure high contrast for text. Slate-600 for body on white, Slate-900 for headings.
Spacing is key. Use 'py-20' or 'py-24' for section vertical padding.
Buttons should be 'font-semibold' and 'uppercase' tracking-wide for a corporate feel.
